overview: Zarin Drive is a complete ride-booking platform for Gwadar, Balochistan with three integrated apps: a customer booking app, a driver operations app, and an admin control dashboard. All features run on mock data with full UI simulation.
features: Customer ride booking with live Leaflet map, vehicle selection, and real-time ride status
Driver app with incoming ride cards, 30-second timer, OTP verification, and earnings tracking
Admin dashboard with live map monitoring, driver/customer management, wallet controls, and analytics
Gold/Black/White premium theme with dark/light mode toggle
English and Urdu language support across all three apps
Rank system (Gold/Diamond/Platinum) for drivers with wallet limits
Promo codes, secret activation codes, and full admin audit logs
